one_sentence_story: A rotating crew of SonicForge hosts guides the crowd through a funny but badass space-rave emergency where the bass saves the party.

host_personas.name: Velvet Orbit MC
host_personas.role: opens the portal and welcomes the crowd

host_personas.name: Prism Auntie
host_personas.role: keeps everyone calm while the lasers wobble

host_personas.name: Glitch Deck Cadet
host_personas.role: reports chaotic system updates from the booth

host_personas.name: Neon Pearl Dispatch
host_personas.role: signals the final bass rescue protocol

host_personas.name: Sub Bass Elder
host_personas.role: closes the show with cosmic relief and lore

avoid: claiming endorsement by named artists or companies
multiple hosts speaking at the same time
two full songs overlapping unless transition lab has already passed
silent fallback to procedural garbage when generation fails

offline_asset_strategy.preferred_voice_source: cached reviewed OmniVoice or fresh approved ComfyUI OmniVoice
